mary Ptolemy/Rome AFRL Extensible Modeling and Analysis Framework Description The Extensible Modeling and Analysis Framework is a collaboration between Rome Air Force Research Laboratory and the Ptolemy project . The first phase of this project star

emy project . The first phase of this project started on February 29, 2008 and ended on August 28, 2010. The second phase started on April 28, 2011 and ended on January 28, 2013. Ptolemy/Rome AFRL Ptolemy Extensible Systems Dynamics Framework - A p
